name: Fuji Frontier - Master 0 (base scanner layer)
description: Shared scanner-look layer applied beneath every film delta preset. Emulates Fuji Frontier 'Master 0' defaults so the Frontier signature is added once, not baked twice. Film presets stack their film-specific deltas on top of this base.

input_transform.comment: De-log / scan-normalization stage applied to the flat 16-bit input BEFORE any film look. BRIGHTNESS KNOBS: 'gamma' is the main exposure dial (>1 brighter midtones, <1 darker). 'delog_strength' blends in an S-curve to restore contrast, but it darkens everything below mid-grey, so lower it if images come out too dark. 'black_clip_pct' deepens blacks (lower = lifted/brighter shadows); 'white_clip_pct' brightens highlights (higher = more pixels pushed to white). auto_levels stretches the real black/white points back to full range, clipping a tiny percentile of outliers.

base_look.comment: Moderate S-curve, mild shadow deepening, slight highlight compression, low-key cyan/green coolness, saturation a few points above neutral.
